title: Glacier Sensor Net: Predicate Prefix-Cache Ordering
strategies: trivial: evaluate predicates in the natural channel order 0..N-1 (no reordering) -- reproduces the evaluator's weak baseline
first-appearance locality: order channels by when they are first seen scanning the training stream -- coarse locality but ignores frequency/co-occurrence
frequency-descending: put globally hot channels first so common leading prefixes are shared
co-occurrence clustering: grow the order by appending the channel most co-queried with those already placed, keeping sensor 'stations' contiguous
seeded local search: swap-based hill-climb over the training trie-node count from principled inits, refining without overfitting -- transfers to the held-out stream
